title: ammannia parkeri var. longifolia
intro: Ammannia parkeri var. longifolia, also known as Long-stalked Amanxia or Long-stalked Ammania, is a plant species in the family Lythraceae. This plant has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ammannia parkeri var. longifolia include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or by applying the plant directly to the affected area.
